country_region: Malawi; Sub Sahara & South East Africa
indicators_measured: Dietary diversity value, Crops diversity, Intercropping rate, Soil Management practices, Land size, Livestock ownership, Asset Index, Gender decision-making
strengths_and_limitations: (Strength) farmer led mixed method; (Limitation) There is no control group
lessons_learned: By crop diversity the nutrient intake improves

adaptation_focus: Adaptation of climate variation through adaptive capacity of small holder farmers
lessons_learned: Through education and awareness with gender disparity, adaptive capacity can be driven.

country_region: East Africa; Kenya; Uganda; Tanzania; Ethiopia
adaptation_focus: Farm level adaptation to climate risk
indicators_measured: Household, climate, institutional, food security, income and adaptation process indicators
strengths_and_limitations: Multi method is strong but it is limited due to missing longitudinal data
lessons_learned: Adaptation is driven by factors like household, institutional, and climate factors

adaptation_focus: Climate adaptation planning for smallholders connected with crop occupation
indicators_measured: crop suitability change (%), adaptive capacity index, vulnerability index, safe drinking water access (%), school attendance (%), housing quality (%), road density, loan access (%), technical assistance (%)
strengths_and_limitations: (Strength) utilises different countries for assessment of municipal level weaknesses. (Limitation) Depends on proxy measures and secondary data; local validity not confirmed.
lessons_learned: Cluster analysis highlights that different countries have different needs; priority ranks highlight which parts need what sort of help.

adaptation_focus: Adaptation capacity and strategies at farm level
indicators_measured: Income generating from farming, availability of labour, size of land, perceptions about climatic changes and adaptive measurements
strengths_and_limitations: (Strength) mixed method approach makes the study valuable. (Limitation) Sample is very small, limiting external validity.
lessons_learned: This study improves insight through mixed method approach but cross-sectional data limits inference.
